documentType.description: Defines the document type to be opened
documentType.title: Document Type

height.description: Defines the document height in the browser window
height.title: Height

width.description: Defines the document width in the browser window
width.title: Width

token.description: Defines the encrypted signature added to the ONLYOFFICE Docs config in the form of a token
token.title: Token

type.description: Defines the platform type used to access the document
type.title: Type

document.description: Defines document parameters and access settings

fileType.description: Defines the type of the file for the source viewed or edited document. Must be lowercase.
fileType.title: File Type

isForm.description: Defines if the PDF file is a PDF form or a standard PDF file
isForm.title: Is Form

key.description: Defines the unique document identifier used by the service to recognize the document. Must be unique, max 128 characters. Allowed chars: 0-9, a-z, A-Z, -._=
key.title: Key

referenceData.description: Defines an object that is generated by the integrator to uniquely identify a file in its system

fileKey.description: The unique document identifier used by the service to get a link to the file
fileKey.title: File Key

referenceData.title: Reference Data

title.description: Defines the desired file name for the viewed or edited document. Max 128 characters.
title.title: Title

url.description: Defines the absolute URL where the source viewed or edited document is stored
url.title: URL

permissions.description: Allows to change the permission for the document to be edited and downloaded or not

changeHistory.description: Allows to display the Restore button when using the onRequestRestore event. Deprecated since 5.5
changeHistory.title: Change History

chat.description: Defines if the chat functionality is enabled in the document
chat.title: Chat

comment.description: Defines if the document can be commented or not. Default coincides with edit parameter.
comment.title: Comment

commentGroups.description: Defines the groups whose comments the user can edit, remove and/or view

oneOf.description: The user can edit comments made by other users
Empty string means user can edit comments from any group
The user can remove comments made by other users
Empty string means user can remove comments from any group
The user can view comments made by other users
Empty string means user can view comments from any group

commentGroups.title: Comment Groups

copy.description: Defines if the content can be copied to the clipboard
copy.title: Copy

deleteCommentAuthorOnly.description: Defines if the user can delete only his/her comments
deleteCommentAuthorOnly.title: Delete Comment Author Only

download.description: Defines if the document can be downloaded or only viewed/edited online
download.title: Download

edit.description: Defines if the document can be edited or only viewed
edit.title: Edit

editCommentAuthorOnly.description: Defines if the user can edit only his/her comments
editCommentAuthorOnly.title: Edit Comment Author Only

fillForms.description: Defines if the forms can be filled. Default coincides with edit or review parameter.
fillForms.title: Fill Forms

modifyContentControl.description: Defines if the content control settings can be changed
modifyContentControl.title: Modify Content Control

modifyFilter.description: Defines if the filter can be applied globally (true) or locally (false)
modifyFilter.title: Modify Filter

print.description: Defines if the document can be printed
print.title: Print

protect.description: Defines if the Protection tab on the toolbar is displayed
protect.title: Protect

rename.description: Allows to display the Rename button. Deprecated since 6.0
rename.title: Rename

review.description: Defines if the document can be reviewed. Default coincides with edit parameter.
review.title: Review

reviewGroups.description: Defines the groups whose changes the user can accept/reject
reviewGroups.title: Review Groups

userInfoGroups.description: Defines the groups of users whose information is displayed in the editors
userInfoGroups.title: User Info Groups

permissions.title: Permissions

info.description: Allows to change additional parameters for the document (owner, folder, uploading date, sharing settings)

author.description: Defines the name of the document author/creator. Deprecated since 5.4, use owner instead.
author.title: Author

created.description: Defines the document creation date. Deprecated since 5.4, use uploaded instead.
created.title: Created

favorite.description: Defines the highlighting state of the Favorite icon. If undefined/null, the icon is not displayed.
favorite.title: Favorite

folder.description: Defines the folder where the document is stored (can be empty for root folder)
folder.title: Folder

owner.description: Defines the name of the document owner/creator
owner.title: Owner

isLink.description: Changes the user icon to the link icon
isLink.title: Is Link

permissions.description: The access rights for the user
permissions.title: Permissions

user.description: The name of the user the document will be shared with
user.title: User

sharingSettings.description: Displays the information about the settings which allow to share the document with other users
sharingSettings.title: Sharing Settings

info.title: Info

document.title: Document

editorConfig.description: Allows to change the parameters pertaining to the editor interface: opening mode, language, buttons, etc.

actionLink.description: Specifies the data received from the document editing service using the onMakeActionLink event or the onRequestSendNotify event
actionLink.title: Action Link

callbackUrl.description: Specifies absolute URL to the document storage service (required)
callbackUrl.title: Callback URL

coEditing.description: Defines the co-editing mode (Fast or Strict) and the possibility to change it

change.description: Defines if the co-editing mode can be changed in the editor interface
change.title: Change

coEditing.title: Co-Editing

createUrl.description: Defines the absolute URL of the document where it will be created and available after creation
createUrl.title: Create URL

lang.description: Defines the editor interface language using two-letter language codes (de, ru, it, etc.). For Portuguese (Portugal) or Chinese (Traditional, Taiwan) use pt-PT or zh-TW
lang.title: Language

location.description: Defines the default measurement units. Specify us or ca for inches. Deprecated since 8.2, use region parameter instead.
location.title: Location

folder.description: The folder where the document is stored
folder.title: Folder

title.description: The document title that will be displayed in the Open Recent menu
title.title: Title

url.description: The absolute URL to the document
url.title: URL

recent.description: Defines the presence or absence of the documents in the Open Recent menu option
recent.title: Recent

region.description: Defines the default display format for currency and date/time using four letter codes (en-US, fr-FR, etc.)
region.title: Region

image.description: The absolute URL to the image for template
image.title: Image

title.description: The template title that will be displayed in the Create New menu
title.title: Title

url.description: The absolute URL to the document where it will be created
url.title: URL

templates.description: Defines the presence or absence of the templates in the Create New menu option
templates.title: Templates

user.description: Defines the user currently viewing or editing the document

firstname.description: The first name of the user. Deprecated since 4.2, use user.name instead
firstname.title: Firstname

group.description: The group (or several groups separated with commas) the user belongs to
group.title: Group

id.description: The identification of the user. Max 128 characters. Recommended to use anonymized hash.
id.title: ID

image.description: The path to the user's avatar
image.title: Image

lastname.description: The last name of the user. Deprecated since 4.2, use user.name instead
lastname.title: Lastname

name.description: The full name of the user. Max 128 characters. Used since version 4.2.
name.title: Name

user.title: User

customization.description: Allows to customize editor interface and behavior

about.description: Defines if the About menu button is displayed or hidden
about.title: About

request.description: Defines if to request anonymous user label
request.title: Request

autosave.description: Defines if autosave is enabled or disabled
autosave.title: Autosave

close.description: Defines settings for the Close button
close.title: Close

comments.description: Defines if the comments functionality is enabled
comments.title: Comments

compactHeader.description: Defines if the editor header is displayed in a compact mode
compactHeader.title: Compact Header

compactToolbar.description: Defines if the editor toolbar is displayed in a compact mode
compactToolbar.title: Compact Toolbar

compatibleFeatures.description: Defines if compatible features are enabled
compatibleFeatures.title: Compatible Features

featuresTips.description: Defines if tooltips about new editor features will be displayed
featuresTips.title: Features Tips

roles.description: Defines if role settings are disabled in pdf forms
roles.title: Roles

mode.description: Defines if the spell checker is automatically switched on or off
mode.title: Mode

spellcheck.description: Defines if the spell checker is enabled

change.description: Defines if the tab background setting will be displayed
change.title: Change

tabBackground.description: Defines the background of the top toolbar tabs

change.description: Defines if the tab style setting will be displayed
change.title: Change

tabStyle.description: Defines the style of the top toolbar tabs

url.description: The absolute URL to the website address for feedback
url.title: URL

visible.description: Shows or hides the Feedback & Support menu button
visible.title: Visible

feedback.description: Defines settings for the Feedback & Support menu button

forcesave.description: Adds the request for force saving when saving the document
forcesave.title: Force Save

forceWesternFontSize.description: Defines if Western (true) or Chinese (false) font size is used in Chinese UI
forceWesternFontSize.title: Force Western Font Size

goback.description: Defines settings for the Open file location menu button

blank.description: Opens the website in a new browser tab (true) or current tab (false)
blank.title: Blank

requestClose.description: Calls events.onRequestClose instead of opening a browser tab. Deprecated since 8.1.
requestClose.title: Request Close

text.description: The text for the Open file location button
text.title: Text

url.description: The absolute URL to open when clicking the button
url.title: URL

goback.title: Go Back

help.description: Defines if the Help menu button is displayed or hidden
help.title: Help

hideNotes.description: Defines if the note panel is displayed or hidden on first loading. Available for presentation editor only
hideNotes.title: Hide Notes

hideRightMenu.description: Defines if the right menu is displayed or hidden on first loading
hideRightMenu.title: Hide Right Menu

hideRulers.description: Defines if the editor rulers are displayed or hidden (false for documents, true for presentations)
hideRulers.title: Hide Rulers

integrationMode.description: Defines the mode of embedding editors into the web page
integrationMode.title: Integration Mode

logo.description: Changes the image file at the top left corner of the editor header. Recommended height: 20 pixels.

imageDark.description: Path to the image file for dark header (300x20)
imageDark.title: Image (Dark)

imageLight.description: Path to the image file for light header (300x20)
imageLight.title: Image (Light)

imageEmbedded.description: Path to the image file for embedded mode (248x40). Deprecated since 7.0.
imageEmbedded.title: Image (Embedded)

url.description: The absolute URL which will be used when someone clicks the logo image
url.title: URL

logo.title: Logo

macros.description: Defines if document macros will be automatically run when the editor opens
macros.title: Macros

macrosMode.description: Defines the macros run mode when autostart is enabled
macrosMode.title: Macros Mode

mentionShare.description: Defines the hint that describes the event after mentions in a comment
mentionShare.title: Mention Share

mobile.description: Defines the mobile document editor settings

forceView.description: Defines whether the view mode is enabled on launch
forceView.title: Force View

info.description: Defines whether the Document Info button is displayed
info.title: Info

standardView.description: Defines whether the editor will be opened in Standard view
standardView.title: Standard View

mobile.title: Mobile

mobileForceView.description: Defines if the mobile document editor is opened in view/edit mode on launch. Deprecated since 8.2, use mobile parameter instead.
mobileForceView.title: Mobile Force View

plugins.description: Defines if plugins will be launched and available
plugins.title: Plugins

pointerMode.description: Defines the pointer mode when the presentation editor is loaded in the viewer
pointerMode.title: Pointer Mode

review.description: Contains the information about the review mode

hideReviewDisplay.description: Defines if the Display mode button is displayed on the Collaboration tab
hideReviewDisplay.title: Hide Review Display

hoverMode.description: Defines the review display mode: tooltips (true) or balloons (false)
hoverMode.title: Hover Mode

showReviewChanges.description: Defines if the review changes panel is automatically displayed
showReviewChanges.title: Show Review Changes

trackChanges.description: Defines if the document is opened in the review editing mode. Default: depends on document.permissions.review
trackChanges.title: Track Changes

review.title: Review

reviewDisplay.description: Defines the review editing mode in the document editor. Deprecated since 7.0, use review.reviewDisplay instead.
reviewDisplay.title: Review Display

showHorizontalScroll.description: Defines if the horizontal scroll is automatically displayed when the spreadsheet editor is loaded. Available since 8.3
showHorizontalScroll.title: Show Horizontal Scroll

showReviewChanges.description: Defines if the review changes panel is automatically displayed. Deprecated since 7.0, use review.showReviewChanges instead.
showReviewChanges.title: Show Review Changes

showVerticalScroll.description: Defines if the vertical scroll is automatically displayed when the spreadsheet editor is loaded. Available since 8.3
showVerticalScroll.title: Show Vertical Scroll

slidePlayerBackground.description: Defines the background color for the slide show in the presentation editor. Can be HEX, RGB, or RGBA. Available since 8.3.
slidePlayerBackground.title: Slide Player Background

spellcheck.description: Defines if the spell checker is automatically switched on or off. Deprecated since 7.1, use features.spellcheck instead.
spellcheck.title: Spell Check

visible.description: Defines whether the Complete & Submit button will be displayed
visible.title: Visible

resultMessage.description: Defines a message displayed after forms are submitted
resultMessage.title: Result Message

submitForm.description: Defines the Complete & Submit button settings. Available since 8.3

suggestFeature.description: Defines whether the Suggest a Feature menu button will be displayed
suggestFeature.title: Suggest Feature

toolbarHideFileName.description: Defines if the document title is visible on the top toolbar
toolbarHideFileName.title: Toolbar Hide File Name

toolbarNoTabs.description: Defines if the top toolbar tabs are distinctly displayed (false) or only highlighted (true). Deprecated since 8.2.
toolbarNoTabs.title: Toolbar No Tabs

trackChanges.description: Defines if the document is opened in the review editing mode. Deprecated since 7.0, use review.trackChanges instead.
trackChanges.title: Track Changes

unit.description: Defines the measurement units used on the ruler
unit.title: Unit

wordHeadingsColor.description: Defines the HEX color for the default heading styles in the document editor. Available since 8.3.
wordHeadingsColor.title: Word Headings Color

zoom.description: Defines the document display zoom value in percent. Can be -1 (fit to page) or -2 (fit width)
zoom.title: Zoom

editMode.description: Defines if the header is displayed in edit mode
editMode.title: Edit Mode

save.description: Defines if the Save button is displayed
save.title: Save

user.description: Defines if the user name and avatar are displayed
user.title: User

users.description: Defines if the button with the editing users is displayed
users.title: Users

mode.description: Defines the initial value of the left panel visibility
mode.title: Mode

navigation.description: Defines if the Navigation button is displayed. Available for document editor only
navigation.title: Navigation

spellcheck.description: Defines if the Spellcheck button is displayed. Available for spreadsheet editor only
spellcheck.title: Spell Check

mode.description: Defines the initial value of the right panel visibility
mode.title: Mode

actionStatus.description: Defines if an action status is displayed
actionStatus.title: Action Status

docLang.description: Defines if a button for choosing the document language is displayed. Available for document and presentation editors
docLang.title: Document Language

textLang.description: Defines if a button for choosing the text language is displayed. Available for document and presentation editors
textLang.title: Text Language

mailmerge.description: Defines if the button for choosing the mail merge base is displayed
mailmerge.title: Mail Merge

draw.description: Defines if the Draw tab is displayed
draw.title: Draw

close.description: Defines if the Close menu option is displayed
close.title: Close

info.description: Defines if the Document info option is displayed
info.title: Info

save.description: Defines if the Save option is displayed
save.title: Save

settings.description: Defines if the Advanced settings option is displayed
settings.title: Settings

home.description: Defines the Home tab settings. This tab cannot be hidden.
home.title: Home

layout.description: Defines if the Layout tab is displayed. Available for document and spreadsheet editors
layout.title: Layout

plugins.description: Defines if the Plugins tab is displayed
plugins.title: Plugins

protect.description: Defines if the Protection tab is displayed
protect.title: Protect

references.description: Defines if the References tab is displayed. Available for document editor only
references.title: References

save.description: Defines if the Save button on the toolbar is displayed. Used when compactHeader is true
save.title: Save

navigation.description: Defines if the Navigation button is displayed. Available for document editor only
navigation.title: Navigation

leftMenu.description: Defines if the left menu panel is displayed or hidden. Deprecated since 7.1, use layout.leftMenu instead.
leftMenu.title: Left Menu

loaderLogo.description: Defines the path to the image logo which will be displayed while the document is being loaded
loaderLogo.title: Loader Logo

loaderName.description: Defines the text which will be displayed while the document is being loaded
examples: The document is loading, please wait...
loaderName.title: Loader Name

rightMenu.description: Defines if the right menu panel is displayed or hidden. Deprecated since 7.1, use layout.rightMenu instead.
rightMenu.title: Right Menu

statusBar.description: Defines if the status bar is displayed or hidden. Deprecated since 7.1, use layout.statusBar instead.
statusBar.title: Status Bar

toolbar.description: Defines if the top toolbar is displayed or hidden. Deprecated since 7.1, use layout.toolbar instead.
toolbar.title: Toolbar

customization.title: Customization

embedded.description: Defines settings for the embedded viewer

embedUrl.description: Defines the absolute URL which will be used when clicking the embed button
embedUrl.title: Embed URL

fullscreenUrl.description: Defines the absolute URL which will be used when clicking the fullscreen button
fullscreenUrl.title: Fullscreen URL

saveUrl.description: Defines the absolute URL that will allow the document to be saved onto the user's computer
saveUrl.title: Save URL

shareUrl.description: Defines the absolute URL that will allow other users to share this document
shareUrl.title: Share URL

toolbarDocked.description: Defines the place for the embedded viewer toolbar
toolbarDocked.title: Toolbar Docked

embedded.title: Embedded

autostart.description: Defines the array of plugin GUIDs that will be automatically started
autostart.title: Autostart

options.description: Defines an object which allows configuring plugins from an external source

all.description: Defines the parameters which will be set for all plugins
all.title: All

options.title: Options

pluginsData.description: Defines the array of absolute URLs to the plugin configuration files (config.json)
pluginsData.title: Plugins Data

url.description: Defines the absolute URL to the directory where the plugins are stored. Deprecated since 4.3.
url.title: URL

editorConfig.title: Editor Config
